name: Potato Salad Monte Carlo
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes with their skins on until fully cooked.
2. Allow the potatoes to cool completely, then peel and dice them.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients: diced potatoes, minced green onions, sliced hard-boiled eggs, onion salt, white pepper, and mayonnaise.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Cover the bowl and allow the salad to set in the refrigerator for at least two hours before serving.
